---
title: "Projects and Experience"
toc: true
listing: 
  - id: gis-listings
    contents:
      - "/projects/gis/*.qmd"
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    type: grid
    fields:
      - title
      - image
  - id: consulting-listings
    contents:
      - "/projects/consulting/*.qmd"
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    type: grid
    fields:
      - title
      - image
  - id: dh-listings
    contents:
      - "/projects/digital-humanities/*.qmd"
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    type: grid
    fields:
      - title
      - image
  - id: web-listings
    contents:
      - "/projects/web-development/*.qmd"
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    type: grid
    fields:
      - title
      - image
  - id: ml-listings
    contents:
      - "/projects/machine-learning/*.qmd"
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    type: grid
    fields:
      - title
      - image
---

My projects and experience span various fields, including GIS, consulting, business analytics, and more. From my work, I have learned that my ultimate goal is to better the way in which people experience the world. Although I am not able to share the deliverables for some of my consulting work due to non-disclosure agreements, I am happy to connect and discuss my skills and takeaways.

## GIS and Mapping

::: {#gis-listings}
:::

## Consulting and Business Analytics

::: {#consulting-listings}
:::

## Digital Humanities

::: {#dh-listings}
:::

## Web Development

::: {#web-listings}
:::

## Machine Learning

::: {#ml-listings}
:::
